direct_update_required_when: adding a governance script, check, test, public Just recipe, workflow artifact, role protocol, phase bundle, topology surface, session/runtime authority surface, or machine-readable governance contract
renaming or relocating a governance surface
retiring a leaf script or compatibility wrapper
changing the owner, phase, side-effect class, debug artifact, or public exposure of a governance surface

implementation_plan.title: Script Surface Inventory and Public Entry Contract
implementation_plan.goal: replace ad-hoc public script discovery with a deterministic machine-readable inventory and fail new public governance surfaces that lack topology metadata

implementation_plan.title: Phase Checkpoint Bundle Runner
implementation_plan.goal: collapse phase/checkpoint execution behind canonical bundle commands with structured substep diagnostics

implementation_plan.title: Justfile Public Surface Consolidation
implementation_plan.goal: route human-facing recipes through phase bundles and classify leaf recipes as compatibility aliases or retire candidates

implementation_plan.title: Leaf Script Sunset/Compatibility Wrapper Policy
implementation_plan.goal: make wrapper retention explicit, bounded, and mechanically checked instead of leaving duplicate public leaves active forever

implementation_plan.title: Structured Failure Dossier for Phase Bundles
implementation_plan.goal: emit compact terminal phase failures backed by durable structured diagnostics so large bundles reduce public surface without hiding root-cause detail

notes: This bootstrap seed is not yet the full script inventory.
RGF-291 owns population, schema hardening, validation, and public-surface enforcement.
